Get a Proposal Due Diligence Hub 🔒 Client Portal

Request a Proposal

Tell us about your sites and sector

We'll design a compliance-driven cleaning program around your obligations. not a generic quote.

Your requirements

Only your contact details are required. The sections below help us scope your proposal more accurately — but you can skip them entirely and we'll discuss everything by phone.

Your Details

So we know who to call back.

Please enter your full name.

Please enter a valid email address.

Please enter a phone number (minimum 8 digits).

That's enough to get started.

Submit now and our team will call you within 1 business day to discuss your requirements.

or tell us more below for a tailored proposal

About Your Sites (Optional)

Help us understand the scope and scale of what you need.

The cleaning industry estimates by sqm — even a rough number helps us scope accurately.

Cleaning Frequency Required

Select all that apply.

Service Type Required

Select all that apply.

Procurement Context (Optional)

So we can tailor our response to your process.

Currently in a tender process?
Compliance / Certification Requirements

Select all that apply, or leave blank if not yet defined.

Your details are used only to respond to your enquiry. See our Privacy Policy.

Please check the fields above and try again.

What happens next

  1. 1 Your enquiry reaches our procurement team within the hour
  2. 2 A senior team member calls you within 1 business day
  3. 3 We discuss scope, sector requirements and compliance obligations
  4. 4 You receive a tailored proposal addressing your specific procurement framework

Why CPC

  • ISO 9001 / 14001 / 45001 certified
  • Carbon Neutral certified
  • Modern Slavery Statement published annually
  • 30+ years compliant operations
  • 250+ government sites. QBuild Panel since 1997
  • Australian-owned and operated

Prefer to call?

1300 272 888

8am – 6pm AEST, Monday – Friday

Sector Capability

Why CPC for regulated procurement

Government & Defence

30+ years of government panel experience

QBuild Panel since 1997. Security clearance management. Reporting obligations. Metro, regional and remote coverage. The compliance infrastructure that government procurement requires.

Read more →

Industrial & Resources

WHS-controlled high-risk environments

Mining equipment maintenance facilities, power generation infrastructure, hazardous industrial environments. Permit-to-work integration. 24/7 mobilisation. ISO 45001 certified.

Read more →

Carbon Neutral & ESG

Scope 1, 2 and 3. site-level reporting

Proprietary CPC Carbon Neutral Calculator. 100% verified offset across every contract. Site-level emissions reporting for ESG and sustainability disclosure. Applicable to any contract type.

Read more →
